name: Cream Cheese Swirl Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chocolate and 3 tablespoons butter in the top of a double boiler; bring water to a boil.
2. Reduce heat to low and cook until chocolate melts. Set aside to cool.
3. Cream together 2 tablespoons butter, cream cheese, 1 egg, 1 tablespoon flour, and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract until light and fluffy.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the remaining 2 eggs at medium speed of an electric mixer until thick and lemon-colored.
5. Gradually add 3/4 cup sugar to the beaten eggs, beating well.
6. Add 1/2 cup flour, baking powder, and salt to the egg mixture, mixing well.
7. Stir in the cooled chocolate, almond extract, vanilla extract, and chopped pecans or walnuts.
8. Pour half of the chocolate batter into a greased 8-inch square pan and spread with the cheese mixture.
9. Top with the remaining chocolate batter.
10. Cut through the mixture in the pan with a knife to create a marbled effect.
11. Bake at 350°F for 35 to 40 minutes.
12. Cool on a wire rack; cut into squares.
Yield: 16 brownies.
